Find the shortest path from start to end in a weighted graph."""
    dist = {} # dictionary to keep track of the shortest distance from start to each node
    prev = {} # previous node in the shortest path to each node
    for node in graph:
        dist[node] = math.inf # initial distance is infinity
        prev[node] = None # no previous node
    dist[start] = 0 # distance from start to start is 0
    for neighbour in graph[node]:
        if dist[neighbour] > dist[node] + graph[node][neighbour]:
            dist[neighbour] = dist[node] + graph[node][neighbour]
            prev[neighbour] = node
    path = end # initialize path to end
    while prev[end] is not None:
        path = prev[end] + path
        end = prev[end]
    return dist[end], path
